records.ety: [Ar. al-debarān, fr. dabar to follow; so called because this star follows upon the Pleiades.]

defs: A red star of the first magnitude, situated in the eye of Taurus; the Bull's Eye. It is the bright star in the group called the Hyades.
quotes: Now when Aldebaran was mounted high Above the shiny Cassiopeia's chair.
